import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; const Home = () => { const features = [ { icon: '📝', title: 'Report Issues', desc: 'Report city problems with photos and location', link: '/report' }, { icon: '📊', title: 'Track Complaints', desc: 'Monitor your complaint status in real-time', link: '/track' }, { icon: '🎯', title: 'Admin Dashboard', desc: 'Manage and update complaint statuses', link: '/admin' }, { icon: '📈', title: 'City Analytics', desc: 'View city health metrics and trends', link: '/analytics' }, { icon: '🌱', title: 'Green Tips', desc: 'Learn how to keep your city clean', link: '/tips' }, { icon: '💨', title: 'Air Quality', desc: 'Monitor real-time air quality data', link: '/air-quality' }, ]; return (

); }; export default Home;
